main.description: Owner's cryptographic grant of membership to a specific DID for a specific community. Stored on the owner's (or future moderator's) PDS. Together with com.wumblr.community.member on the member's PDS, constitutes effective membership. Revocation = delete this record. Rkey convention: <community-rkey>-<member-did-tail> for deterministic lookup, e.g. solarpunk-3jl7m4.
